functionEntry.name: formatMgrs
functionEntry.documentation: Returns null if `toGeoString(GEO_MGRS)` fails (e.g. polar edge cases).

functionEntry.name: layoutBottomPillRow
functionEntry.documentation: Places toggle | save | back in one horizontal row at the bottom. Returns y coordinate above the row (for compass text).

functionEntry.name: measureCompactPill
functionEntry.documentation: Compact pill: [width, height, radius, font]. Single row, small padding, capped height.
